body.title: Granny: end-to-end dispatch smoke test (dispatch → /sprint-ticket runs → ack recorded)
body.result: 8 smoke tests: dispatch→ack→started→timeout chain, availability gate, one-at-a-time gate
body.description:
**Problem:** No automated test verifies the full Granny→CC dispatch chain end-to-end. Individual pieces are tested but the integration is untested, which means breakage (like the 2026-06-05 barrage) isn't caught before it hits production.

**What to build:** Integration test (can use mock tmux / stub send-keys) that: (1) puts a sprint ticket in the queue, (2) triggers Granny poll cycle, (3) verifies the correct send-keys command was issued with the right session name, (4) verifies dispatch state is recorded correctly.

**Affected files:** tests/granny/, possibly devices/granny/daemon.py if testability improvements needed
**Design rules:** Integration tests hit real Postgres; mock at the tmux/subprocess boundary only
**Scope boundary:** The dispatch→CC side only. DickSimnel dispatch is a separate concern.
**Completion criteria:** Test runs green in CI. Covers: ticket dispatched, correct tmux session targeted, dispatch state updated in DB/queue.
